question: Which team won the 2024 NBA Championship?
explanation: The Celtics beat the Mavericks 4-1 to win their 18th championship!

question: Which player won the 2024 NBA Finals MVP?
explanation: Jaylen Brown was named Finals MVP after leading the Celtics to the title!

question: Which team won the 2023 NBA Championship?
explanation: The Nuggets won their first-ever NBA title, led by Nikola Jokic!

question: Which player is known for playing for the Golden State Warriors and making lots of three-pointers?
explanation: Steph Curry is the greatest three-point shooter in NBA history!

question: Which NBA player won the MVP award for the 2023-24 season?
explanation: Nikola Jokic of the Denver Nuggets won his third MVP award!

question: Which team does LeBron James play for?
explanation: LeBron James has played for the Lakers since 2018!

question: How many teams are in the NBA?
explanation: There are 30 teams in the NBA, split into Eastern and Western conferences!

question: Which rookie was named NBA Rookie of the Year for the 2023-24 season?
explanation: Chet Holmgren of the Oklahoma City Thunder won Rookie of the Year!

question: Which city do the Bucks play in?
explanation: The Milwaukee Bucks play in Milwaukee, Wisconsin!

question: Which tall player from France was the #1 pick in the 2023 NBA Draft?
explanation: Victor Wembanyama was drafted #1 by the San Antonio Spurs - he's 7 feet 4 inches tall!

question: What is the NBA championship trophy called?
explanation: The Larry O'Brien Championship Trophy is given to the NBA champion each year!

question: Which team plays at Madison Square Garden in New York City?
explanation: The Knicks play at the famous Madison Square Garden, known as 'The Garden'!

question: Which Mavericks star scored 73 points in a single game against the Hawks in January 2024?
explanation: Luka Doncic scored 73 points against the Hawks — only Wilt Chamberlain and Bam Adebayo have scored more in a game!

question: LeBron James and his son Bronny made history in 2024 by doing what?
options: Playing on the same NBA team
correct_answer: Playing on the same NBA team
explanation: LeBron and Bronny James became the first father-son duo to play on the same NBA team - the Lakers!

question: Which team had the best record in the NBA during the 2023-24 regular season?
explanation: The Celtics had the best record at 64-18 and went on to win the championship!
